title: (Bullish Signal) LHCG, enters Uptrend as Momentum ascends above 0 level on Nov 11, 2020
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This indicator may be signaling that LHCG's price has momentum to move higher, since its current price exceeds the price logged 14 days ago. Traders may consider buying the stock or exploring call options. Tickeron A.I.dvisor backtested 87 similar cases where LHCG's Momentum Indicator exceeded 0, and 72 of them led to a successful outcome. Odds of Success: 83%. Current price $217.27 crossed the resistance line at $226.32 and is trading between $226.32 resistance and $205.00 resistance lines. Throughout the month of 10/12/20 - 11/11/20, the price experienced a -3% Downtrend. During the week of 11/04/20 - 11/11/20, the stock fell -5%.

https://preview.redd.it/uo778st59uy51.png?width=1525&format=png&auto=webp&s=7d6fe692030caa5b3cc8286367afe28af697282b

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The Momentum Indicator moved above the 0 level on November 11, 2020. You may want to consider a long position or call options on LHCG as a result. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 72 of 87 past instances where the momentum indicator moved above 0, the stock continued to climb. The odds of a continued upward trend are 83%.

LHCG moved above its 50-day Moving Average on September 25, 2020 date and that indicates a change from a downward trend to an upward trend.

Following a +2.37% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where LHCG advanced for three days, in 269 of 352 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 76%.

The Aroon Indicator entered an Uptrend today. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 213 of 293 cases where LHCG Aroon's Indicator entered an Uptrend, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued Uptrend are 73%.
